sentences.target: Mi bicicleta está en el patio.

translations.es: Mi bicicleta está en el patio.
translations.en: My bicycle is in the yard.
translations.fr: Mon vélo est dans la cour.
translations.it: La mia bicicletta è nel cortile.
translations.pt: A minha bicicleta está no pátio.
translations.vi: Xe đạp của tôi ở trong sân.
translations.nl: Mijn fiets staat in de tuin.
translations.el: Το ποδήλατό μου είναι στην αυλή.
translations.ja: 私の自転車は中庭にあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing in number with the noun; here modifies 'bicicleta'.
Common noun, singular feminine; core noun of the noun phrase.
Auxiliary/copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to locative complement.
Adposition introducing the locative phrase.
Definite article, singular masculine; modifies 'patio'.
Common noun, singular masculine; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Veo una bicicleta roja en la calle.
sentences.reading: /ˈbe.o ˈu.na βisiˈkle.ta ˈro.xa en la ˈka.ʝe/

translations.es: Veo una bicicleta roja en la calle.
translations.ipa: /ˈbe.o ˈu.na βisiˈkle.ta ˈro.xa en la ˈka.ʝe/
translations.en: I see a red bicycle in the street.
translations.fr: Je vois un vélo rouge dans la rue.
translations.de: Ich sehe ein rotes Fahrrad auf der Straße.
translations.it: Vedo una bicicletta rossa in strada.
translations.ko: 나는 길에 있는 빨간 자전거를 본다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看到街上有一辆红色自行车。
translations.yue: 我見到街上有一架紅色單車。
translations.ru: Я вижу красный велосипед на улице.
translations.pt: Vejo uma bicicleta vermelha na rua.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một chiếc xe đạp màu đỏ trên đường.
translations.nl: Ik zie een rode fiets op straat.
translations.uk: Я бачу червоний велосипед на вулиці.
translations.hu: Látok egy piros biciklit az ქუჩán.
translations.hi: मैं सड़क पर एक लाल साइकिल देखता हूँ।
translations.el: Βλέπω ένα κόκκινο ποδήλατο στον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Jeg ser en rød sykkel i gaten.
translations.id: Saya melihat sepeda merah di jalan.
translations.sv: Jag ser en röd cykel på gatan.
translations.ro: Văd o bicicletă roșie pe stradă.
translations.da: Jeg ser en rød cykel på gaden.
translations.ja: 私は通りで赤い自転車を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite determiner, singular feminine; modifies 'bicicleta'.
Common noun, singular feminine; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adjective, singular feminine; modifies 'bicicleta'.
Adposition introducing the locative phrase.
Definite article, singular feminine; modifies 'calle'.
Common noun, singular feminine; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Pedro limpia su bicicleta después del paseo.
sentences.reading: /ˈpeðɾo ˈlim.pja su βisiˈkle.ta desˈpwes del paˈse.o/

translations.es: Pedro limpia su bicicleta después del paseo.
translations.ipa: /ˈpeðɾo ˈlim.pja su βisiˈkle.ta desˈpwes del paˈse.o/
translations.en: Pedro cleans his bicycle after the ride.
translations.fr: Pedro nettoie son vélo après la promenade.
translations.de: Pedro putzt sein Fahrrad nach der Fahrt.
translations.it: Pedro pulisce la sua bicicletta dopo la passeggiata.
translations.zh-Hans: 佩德罗在骑行后清洁他的自行车。
translations.yue: Pedro 喺踩完單車之後清潔佢嘅單車。
translations.ru: Педро чистит свой велосипед после поездки.
translations.pt: Pedro limpa a bicicleta depois do passeio.
translations.he: פדרו מנקה את האופניים שלו אחרי הרכיבה.
translations.vi: Pedro lau sạch xe đạp của mình sau chuyến đi.
translations.nl: Pedro maakt zijn fiets schoon na de rit.
translations.uk: Педро чистить свій велосипед після поїздки.
translations.hu: Pedro megtisztítja a biciklijét a tekerés után.
translations.hi: पेड्रो सवारी के बाद अपनी साइकिल साफ करता है।
translations.pl: Pedro czyści swój rower po przejażdżce.
translations.el: Ο Πέδρο καθαρίζει το ποδήλατό του μετά τη βόλτα.
translations.nb: Pedro rengjør sykkelen sin etter turen.
translations.sv: Pedro rengör sin cykel efter turen.
translations.ro: Pedro își curăță bicicleta după plimbare.
translations.cs: Pedro čistí své kolo po jízdě.
translations.da: Pedro gør sin cykel ren efter turen.
translations.ja: ペドロは乗った後で自転車をきれいにします。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Possessive determiner, invariable for gender and number; modifies 'bicicleta'.
Common noun, singular feminine; direct object of the verb.
Adverb used here in a temporal phrase.
Contracted form of the preposition 'de' plus definite article 'el'; introduces the complement 'paseo'.
Common noun, singular masculine; complement of the contracted preposition.

sentences.target: La bicicleta de Ana es nueva.

translations.es: La bicicleta de Ana es nueva.
translations.it: La bicicletta di Ana è nuova.
translations.pt: A bicicleta de Ana é nova.
translations.vi: Xe đạp của Ana là mới.
translations.el: Το ποδήλατο της Άνα είναι καινούργιο.
translations.ja: アナの自転車は新しいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, singular feminine; modifies 'bicicleta'.
Common noun, singular feminine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a genitive/associative complement.
Proper noun; complement of the preposition 'de'.
Copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Adjective, singular feminine; subject complement describing 'bicicleta'.
